arts.ttl: Liverpool star is finally ‘very close’ to signing new contract – Positive signs continue, getting what he wants
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is ‘very close’ to signing a two-year contract extension with Liverpool and bringing the drama around his contract to an end. arts.sum: Liverpool may be forced to sign a new right winger if Mohamed Salah leaves the club at the end of the season, and they already have a replacement in mind should that possibility turn into reality. arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah to extend with Liverpool

arts.ttl: Everton handed potential transfer boost – Trio of transfer rivals couldn’t compete financially
arts.sum: Everton are one of the teams keen on signing Richarlison from Tottenham this summer and may have an advantage in the race. That’s at least according to Jorge Nicola, who reports that Everton are looking at bringing their former star back to the club this summer.
